identity.vocalStyle: Smooth male lead with playful confidence mixed with intimate whispered ad-libs and staccato spoken interjections between sung phrases
identity.styleSentence: A glossy late-90s club track at 96 BPM featuring sparse syncopated drums with off-grid percussion clicks, a rubbery bassline, and bright chiptune/FM synth riffs that evoke classic blue-sky video game music, all anchored by smooth confident male vocals utilizing intimate spoken replies to create a stop-start rhythmic pocket.
identity.summary: A confident R&B track where a playful protagonist asserts their reliability and stability in a relationship, rejecting neediness while embracing the thrill of the moment.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A neon-lit city street at night where shadows seem to have eyes, reflecting off wet pavement under flickering blue and magenta lights.
A massive glowing pillar of light standing firm against a chaotic storm of digital raindrops in a futuristic plaza.
Two silhouettes sharing a quiet moment behind frosted glass, with soft pink light leaking through cracks to reveal intimate gestures inside.
A translucent crystal structure forming the shape of a heart that shimmers brightly without cracking despite heavy impact from surrounding debris.
A futuristic knight made of holographic armor standing protectively in front of a glowing portal, scanning the environment with calm focus.
Glitching pixel art sprites dancing playfully around each other on a checkerboard floor that shifts colors rapidly between red and purple.
